overview: A preventative medicine center using advanced diagnostics and personalized medicine to optimize health and address the root causes of aging. The clinic shifts focus from reactive treatment of illness to proactive health optimization.
highlights: Advanced diagnostics including VO2 Max testing, full-body MRI, and cancer screening
IV Nutrient Therapy and NAD Therapy
targetAudience: Men and women at any age seeking proactive health optimization and longevity.
